    • Job Scheduler

  • clockwerkstars105 - Go package to schedule periodic jobs using a simple, fluent syntax.
  • clockworkstars28 - Simple and intuitive job scheduling library in Go.
  • go-cronstars201 - Simple Cron library for go that can execute closures or functions at varying intervals, from once a second to once a year on a specific date and time. Primarily for web applications and long running daemons.
  • gronstars853 - Define time-based tasks using a simple Go API and Gron’s scheduler will run them accordingly.
  • JobRunnerstars849 - Smart and featureful cron job scheduler with job queuing and live monitoring built in.
  • jobsstars483 - Persistent and flexible background jobs library.
  • leprechaunstars82 - Job scheduler that supports webhooks, crons and classic scheduling.
  • schedulerstars364 - Cronjobs scheduling made easy.

  • JayDiffstars84 - JSON diff utility written in Go.

  • jsonapi-errorsstars9 - Go bindings based on the JSON API errors reference.
  • jsonfstars61 - Console tool for highlighted formatting and struct query fetching JSON.
  • jsongostars96 - Fluent API to make it easier to create Json objects.
  • jsonhalstars9 - Simple Go package to make custom structs marshal into HAL compatible JSON responses.

  • textcatstars65 - Go package for n-gram based text categorization, with support for utf-8 and raw text.
  • whenstars1.1k - Natural EN and RU language date/time parser with pluggable rules.

    • Networking

  • buffstreamsstars243 - Streaming protocolbuffer data over TCP made easy.
  • canopusstars144 - CoAP Client/Server implementation (RFC 7252).
  • dnsstars5.5k - Go library for working with DNS.
  • fasthttpstars15k - Package fasthttp is a fast HTTP implementation for Go, up to 10 times faster than net/http.
  • gopacketstars4.1k - Go library for packet processing with libpcap bindings.
  • gopcapstars416 - Go wrapper for libpcap.
  • gosnmpstars719 - Native Go library for performing SNMP actions.
  • gotcpstars478 - Go package for quickly writing tcp applications.
  • grabstars835 - Go package for managing file downloads.
  • kcptunstars12.4k - Extremely simple & fast udp tunnel based on KCP protocol.
  • linkiostars49 - Network link speed simulation for Reader/Writer interfaces.
  • mdnsstars767 - Simple mDNS (Multicast DNS) client/server library in Golang.
  • waterstars1.2k - Simple TUN/TAP library.
  • winrmstars297 - Go WinRM client to remotely execute commands on Windows machines.

    • Resource Embedding

  • statikstars3.2k - Embeds static files into a Go executable.

    • Science and Data Analysis

  • evalerstars44 - Simple floating point arithmetic expression evaluator.
  • ewmastars332 - Exponentially-weighted moving averages.
  • geomstars47 - 2D geometry for golang.
  • go-dspstars723 - Digital Signal Processing for Go.
  • go-gtstars5 - Graph theory algorithms written in "Go" language.
  • gohistogramstars152 - Approximate histograms for data streams.
  • goraphstars639 - Pure Go graph theory library(data structure, algorith visualization).
  • graphstars443 - Library of basic graph algorithms.
  • pagerankstars69 - Weighted PageRank algorithm implemented in Go.
  • PiHexstars14 - Implementation of the "Bailey-Borwein-Plouffe" algorithm for the hexadecimal number Pi.

    • Security

  • BadActorstars297 - In-memory, application-driven jailer built in the spirit of fail2ban.
  • go-yarastars207 - Go Bindings for YARAstars119, the "pattern matching swiss knife for malware researchers (and everyone else)".
  • ssh-vaultstars285 - encrypt/decrypt using ssh keys.

    • Serialization

  • asn1stars47 - Asn.1 BER and DER encoding library for golang.
  • colferstars602 - Code generation for the Colfer binary format.
  • go-capnprotostars278 - Cap'n Proto library and parser for go.
  • go-codecstars1.5k - High Performance, feature-Rich, idiomatic encode, decode and rpc library for msgpack, cbor and json, with runtime-based OR code-generation support.
  • gogoprotobufstars4.6k - Protocol Buffers for Go with Gadgets.
  • jsoniterstars9.2k - High-performance 100% compatible drop-in replacement of "encoding/json".
  • php_session_decoderstars148 - GoLang library for working with PHP session format and PHP Serialize/Unserialize functions.

    • Server Applications

  • devdstars3.1k - Local webserver for developers.
  • nsq - A realtime distributed messaging platform.

    • Template Engines

  • jetstars778 - Jet template engine.
  • Soystars155 - Closure templates (aka Soy templates) for Go, following the official spec.

    • Testing

  • Fuzzing and delta-debugging/reducing/shrinking.
    • go-fuzzstars4k - Randomized testing system.
    • gofuzzstars1k - Library for populating go objects with random values.
    • Tavorstars232 - Generic fuzzing and delta-debugging framework.
  • Selenium and browser control tools.
    • cdpstars540 - Type-safe bindings for the Chrome Debugging Protocol that can be used with browsers or other debug targets that implement it.
    • chromedpstars6.2k - a way to drive/test Chrome, Safari, Edge, Android Webviews, and other browsers supporting the Chrome Debugging Protocol.
    • ggrstars271 - a lightweight server that routes and proxies Selenium WebDriver requests to multiple Selenium hubs.
    • playwright-gostars325 - browser automation library to control Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API.
    • rodstars1.5k - A Devtools driver to make web automation and scraping easy.
    • selenoidstars1.9k - alternative Selenium hub server that launches browsers within containers.

    • Third-party APIs

  • amazon-product-advertising-apistars48 - Go Client Library for Amazon Product Advertising API.
  • anacondastars1.1k - Go client library for the Twitter 1.1 API.
  • cachetstars88 - Go client library for Cachet (open source status page system).
  • circlecistars57 - Go client library for interacting with CircleCI's API.
  • facebookstars966 - Go Library that supports the Facebook Graph API.
  • fcmstars39 - Go library for Firebase Cloud Messaging.
  • gadsstars49 - Google Adwords Unofficial API.
  • gcmstars29 - Go library for Google Cloud Messaging.
  • megosstars55 - Client library for accessing an Apache Mesos cluster.
  • playlyfestars1 - The Playlyfe Rest API Go SDK.
  • stripestars1.4k - Go client for the Stripe API.
  • zoozstars6 - Go client for the Zooz API.

    • Utilities

  • circuitbreakerstars939 - Circuit Breakers in Go.
  • commandstars13 - Command pattern for Go with thread safe serial and parallel dispatcher.
  • fzfstars36.5k - Command-line fuzzy finder written in Go.
  • git-time-metricstars864 - Simple, seamless, lightweight time tracking for Git.
  • go-astitodostars58 - Parse TODOs in your GO code.
  • go-bind-pluginstars168 - go:generate tool for wrapping symbols exported by golang plugins (1.8 only).
  • go-funkstars2.5k - Modern Go utility library which provides helpers (map, find, contains, filter, chunk, reverse, ...).
  • goreleaserstars8k - Deliver Go binaries as fast and easily as possible.
  • gotenvstars197 - Load environment variables from .env or any io.Reader in Go.
  • htcatstars528 - Parallel and Pipelined HTTP GET Utility.
  • lrserverstars115 - LiveReload server for Go.
  • onecachestars118 - Caching library with support for multiple backend stores (Redis, Memcached, filesystem etc).
  • utilstars206 - Collection of useful utility functions. (strings, concurrency, manipulations, ...).
  • xferspdystars85 - Xferspdy provides binary diff and patch library in golang.

    • Web Frameworks

  • Gondolastars309 - The web framework for writing faster sites, faster.
  • gongularstars442 - Fast Go web framework with input mapping/validation and (DI) Dependency Injection.
  • tigertonicstars999 - Go framework for building JSON web services inspired by Dropwizard.

    Libraries for creating HTTP middlewares

  • ryestars96 - Tiny Go middleware library (with canned Middlewares) that supports JWT, CORS, Statsd, and Go 1.7 context.

    Routers

  • alienstars117 - Lightweight and fast http router from outer space.
  • purestars114 - Is a lightweight HTTP router that sticks to the std "net/http" implementation.
  • Siestastars350 - Composable framework to write middleware and handlers.

    • Code Analysis

  • lintstars66 - Run linters as part of go test.

  • govvvstars478 - “go build” wrapper to easily add version information into Go binaries.

    Other Software

  • borgstars1.5k - Terminal based search engine for bash snippets.
  • boxedstars74 - Dropbox based blog engine.

    Security

  • memguardstars1.9k - A pure Go library for handling sensitive values in memory.

    ORM

  • SQLBoilerstars3.9k - ORM generator. Generate a featureful and blazing-fast ORM tailored to your database schema.

    • Third-party APIs

  • patreon-gostars25 - Go library for Patreon API.

    • Aug 8th, 2017

    Authentication and OAuth

  • authbossstars2.6k - Modular authentication system for the web. It tries to remove as much boilerplate and "hard things" as possible so that each time you start a new web project in Go, you can plug it in, configure, and start building your app without having to build an authentication system each time.

    • Aug 7th, 2017

    Messaging

  • Gollumstars889 - A n:m multiplexer that gathers messages from different sources and broadcasts them to a set of destinations.
  • go-vitotrolstars16 - Client library to Viessmann Vitotrol web service.
  • gorushstars5.4k - Push notification server using APNs2stars2.5k and google GCMstars104.
  • gublestars146 - Messaging server using push notifications (Google Firebase Cloud Messaging, Apple Push Notification services, SMS) as well as websockets, a REST API, featuring distributed operation and message-persistence.
  • machinerystars5.2k - Asynchronous task queue/job queue based on distributed message passing.
  • NATS Go Clientstars3.3k - Lightweight and high performance publish-subscribe and distributed queueing messaging system - this is the Go library.
  • pubsubstars345 - Simple pubsub package for go.
  • saramastars7.2k - Go library for Apache Kafka.
  • Uniqush-Pushstars1.3k - Redis backed unified push service for server-side notifications to mobile devices.
  • zmq4stars907 - Go interface to ZeroMQ version 4. Also available for version 3stars131 and version 2stars18.

    • Audio and Music

  • vorbisstars28 - "Native" Go Vorbis decoder (uses CGO, but has no dependencies).

    • Authentication and OAuth

  • casbinstars1 - Authorization library that supports access control models like ACL, RBAC, ABAC.
  • go-josestars1.8k - Fairly complete implementation of the JOSE working group's JSON Web Token, JSON Web Signatures, and JSON Web Encryption specs.
  • go-oauth2-serverstars1.7k - Standalone, specification-compliant, OAuth2 server written in Golang.
  • jwtstars89 - Clean and easy to use implementation of JSON Web Tokens (JWT).
  • sessionsstars59 - Dead simple, highly performant, highly customizable sessions service for go http servers.

    • Command Line

    Standard CLI

  • argvstars30 - Go library to split command line string as arguments array using the bash syntax.
  • kingpinstars3k - Command line and flag parser supporting sub commands.
  • linerstars786 - Go readline-like library for command-line interfaces.
  • mitchellh/clistars1.3k - Go library for implementing command-line interfaces.
  • mow.clistars733 - Go library for building CLI applications with sophisticated flag and argument parsing and validation.
  • ukautz/clifstars107 - Small command line interface framework.
  • urfave/clistars15.7k - Simple, fast, and fun package for building command line apps in Go (formerly codegangsta/cli).
  • wlogstars51 - Simple logging interface that supports cross-platform color and concurrency.
  • wmenustars136 - Easy to use menu structure for cli applications that prompts users to make choices.

    • Command Line

    Advanced Console UIs

  • uilivestars1.3k - Library for updating terminal output in realtime.
  • uiprogressstars1.8k - Flexible library to render progress bars in terminal applications.
  • uitablestars609 - Library to improve readability in terminal apps using tabular data.

    • Configuration

  • joshbetz/configstars205 - Small configuration library for Go that parses environment variables, JSON files, and reloads automatically on SIGHUP.

    • Data Structures

  • count-min-logstars53 - Go implementation Count-Min-Log sketch: Approximately counting with approximate counters (Like Count-Min sketch but using less memory).
  • go-adaptive-radix-treestars175 - Go implementation of Adaptive Radix Tree.
  • goskipliststars224 - Skip list implementation in Go.
  • gotastars1.6k - Implementation of dataframes, series, and data wrangling methods for Go.

    • Database

  • buntdbstars3.2k - Fast, embeddable, in-memory key/value database for Go with custom indexing and spatial support.
  • cache2gostars1.5k - In-memory key:value cache which supports automatic invalidation based on timeouts.
  • couchcachestars53 - RESTful caching micro-service backed by Couchbase server.
  • diskvstars1k - Home-grown disk-backed key-value store.
  • go-cachestars4.9k - In-memory key:value store/cache (similar to Memcached) library for Go, suitable for single-machine applications.
  • Scribblestars121 - Tiny flat file JSON store.

    • Date and Time

  • carbonstars584 - Simple Time extension with a lot of util methods, ported from PHP Carbon library.

    • Distributed Systems

  • go-jumpstars322 - Port of Google's "Jump" Consistent Hash function.
  • go-kitstars20.1k - Microservice toolkit with support for service discovery, load balancing, pluggable transports, request tracking, etc.
  • hprosestars1.2k - Very newbility RPC Library, support 25+ languages now.
  • NATSstars9.2k - Lightweight, high performance messaging system for microservices, IoT, and cloud native systems.
  • rpcxstars5.6k - Distributed pluggable RPC service framework like alibaba Dubbo.
  • sleuthstars335 - Library for master-less p2p auto-discovery and RPC between HTTP services (using ZeroMQstars6.9k).

    • Email

  • go-dkimstars68 - DKIM library, to sign & verify email.

    • File Handling

  • aferostars3.7k - FileSystem Abstraction System for Go.
  • skywalkerstars64 - Package to allow one to concurrently go through a filesystem with ease.
  • tarfsstars46 - Implementation of the FileSystem interface for tar files.

    • Forms

  • formsstars119 - Framework-agnostic library for parsing and validating form/JSON data which supports multipart forms and files.
  • nosurfstars1.1k - CSRF protection middleware for Go.

    • Generation and Generics

  • pkgreflectstars97 - Go preprocessor for package scoped reflection.

    • Go Compilers

  • gopherjsstars10.1k - Compiler from Go to JavaScript.

    • Goroutines

  • poolstars606 - Limited consumer goroutine or unlimited goroutine pool for easier goroutine handling and cancellation.
  • tunnystars2.3k - Goroutine pool for golang.

    • Images

  • bildstars3.2k - Collection of image processing algorithms in pure Go.
  • imgstars136 - Selection of image manipulation tools.
  • mpostars6 - Decoder and conversion tool for MPO 3D Photos.
  • ptstars1.9k - Path tracing engine written in Go.

    • IoT (Internet of Things)

  • connectordbstars273 - Open-Source Platform for Quantified Self & IoT.

    • Logging

  • go-logstars37 - Log4j implementation in Go.
  • logrusstars17.8k - Structured logger for Go.
  • logxistars346 - 12-factor app logger that is fast and makes you happy.
  • mlogstars23 - Simple logging module for go, with 5 levels, an optional rotating logfile feature and stdout/stderr output.
  • tailstars2.1k - Go package striving to emulate the features of the BSD tail program.
  • xlogstars135 - Structured logger for net/context aware HTTP handlers with flexible dispatching.

    • Machine Learning

  • neural-gostars61 - Multilayer perceptron network implemented in Go, with training via backpropagation.

    Dependency Injection

  • alicestars44 - Additive dependency injection container for Golang.

    • Miscellaneous

    Uncategorized

  • batterystars184 - Cross-platform, normalized battery information library.
  • go-commons-poolstars947 - Generic object pool for Golang.
  • gopsutilstars6.2k - Cross-platform library for retrieving process and system utilization(CPU, Memory, Disks, etc).
  • gountriesstars309 - Package that exposes country and subdivision data.
  • healthstars415 - Easy to use, extensible health check library.
  • indigostars84 - Distributed unique ID generator of using Sonyflake and encoded by Base58.

    • Natural Language Processing

  • go-i18nstars1.6k - Package and an accompanying tool to work with localized text.
  • segmentstars61 - Go library for performing Unicode Text Segmentation as described in Unicode Standard Annex #29
  • sentencesstars296 - Sentence tokenizer: converts text into a list of sentences.
  • whatlanggostars486 - Natural language detection package for Go. Supports 84 languages and 24 scripts (writing systems e.g. Latin, Cyrillic, etc).

    • Networking

  • etherstars69 - Cross-platform Go package for sending and receiving ethernet frames.
  • go-getterstars1.1k - Go library for downloading files or directories from various sources using a URL.
  • go-stunstars430 - Go implementation of the STUN client (RFC 3489 and RFC 5389).
  • gravalstars26 - Experimental FTP server framework.
  • kcp-gostars2.9k - KCP - Fast and Reliable ARQ Protocol.
  • lhttpstars610 - Powerful websocket framework, build your IM server more easily.
  • tcp_serverstars372 - Go library for building tcp servers faster.

    • ORM

  • beego orm - Powerful orm framework for go. Support: pq/mysql/sqlite3.
  • go-storestars101 - Simple and fast Redis backed key-value store library for Go.
  • reformstars1.1k - Better ORM for Go, based on non-empty interfaces and code generation.
  • Zoomstars275 - Blazing-fast datastore and querying engine built on Redis.

    • Query Language

  • graphql-gostars7.6k - Implementation of GraphQL for Go.

    • Science and Data Analysis

  • odestars13 - Ordinary differential equation (ODE) solver which supports extended states and channel-based iteration stop conditions.
  • statsstars2k - Statistics package with common functions missing from the Golang standard library.

    • Security

  • simple-scryptstars170 - Scrypt package with a simple, obvious API and automatic cost calibration built-in.

    • Server Applications

  • etcdstars35.7k - Highly-available key value store for shared configuration and service discovery.

    • Template Engines

  • egostars486 - Lightweight templating language that lets you write templates in Go. Templates are translated into Go and compiled.
  • gofpdfstars3.8k - PDF document generator with high level support for text, drawing and images.
  • liquidstars119 - Go implementation of Shopify Liquid templates.
  • mustachestars1k - Go implementation of the Mustache template language.
  • pongo2stars2k - Django-like template-engine for Go.
  • raymondstars423 - Complete handlebars implementation in Go.
  • velvetstars71 - Complete handlebars implementation in Go.

  • clarifaistars57 - Go client library for interfacing with the Clarifai API.
  • go-marathonstars196 - Go library for interacting with Mesosphere's Marathon PAAS.
  • go-twitchstars20 - Go client for interacting with the Twitch v3 API.

  • google-analyticsstars12 - Simple wrapper for easy google analytics reporting.

    • Utilities

  • apmstars149 - Process manager for Golang applications with an HTTP API.
  • boilrstars1.3k - Blazingly fast CLI tool for creating projects from boilerplate templates.
  • go-httpheaderstars34 - Go library for encoding structs into Header fields.
  • go-ratestars332 - Timed rate limiter for Go.
  • goreporterstars2.9k - Golang tool that does static analysis, unit testing, code review and generate code quality report.
  • goseaweedfsstars83 - SeaweedFS client library with almost full features.
  • mergostars1.5k - Helper to merge structs and maps in Golang. Useful for configuration default values, avoiding messy if-statements.
  • moldovastars160 - Utility for generating random data based on an input template.
  • UNISstars67 - Common Architecture™ for String Utilities in Go.

  • v4lstars55 - Video capture library for Linux, written in Go.

  • go-reststars125 - Small and evil REST framework for Go.
  • Resourseastars31 - REST framework for quickly writing resource based services.

  • utronstars2.2k - Lightweight MVC framework for Go(Golang).

  • httptreemuxstars492 - High-speed, flexible tree-based HTTP router for Go. Inspiration from httprouter.

  • Specific Formats
    • alignstars68 - A general purpose application that aligns text.

    • blackfridaystars4.7k - Markdown processor in Go.
    • bluemondaystars1.9k - HTML Sanitizer.
    • codetreestars17 - Parses indented code (python, pixy, scarlet, etc.) and returns a tree structure.
    • collystars13.8k - Fast and Elegant Scraping Framework for Gophers.
    • commonregexstars739 - A collection of common regular expressions for Go.
    • dataflowkitstars460 - Web scraping Framework to turn websites into structured data.
    • didstars50 - DID (Decentralized Identifiers) Parser and Stringer in Go.
    • doistars6 - Document object identifier (doi) parser in Go.
    • editorconfig-core-gostars84 - Editorconfig file parser and manipulator for Go.
    • encastars11 - Minimal cgo bindings for libenca.
    • encdecstars3 - Package provides a generic interface to encoders and decodersa.
    • genexstars60 - Count and expand Regular Expressions into all matching Strings.
    • github_flavored_markdown - GitHub Flavored Markdown renderer (using blackfriday) with fenced code block highlighting, clickable header anchor links.
    • go-fixedwidthstars53 - Fixed-width text formatting (encoder/decoder with reflection).
    • go-humanizestars2.6k - Formatters for time, numbers, and memory size to human readable format.
    • go-nmeastars148 - NMEA parser library for the Go language.
    • go-output-formatstars1 - Output go structures into multiple formats (YAML/JSON/etc) in your command line app.
    • go-runewidthstars350 - Functions to get fixed width of the character or string.
    • go-slugifystars67 - Make pretty slug with multiple languages support.
    • go-tomlstars994 - Go library for the TOML format with query support and handy cli tools.
    • go-vcardstars55 - Parse and format vCard.
    • go-wildcardstars2 - Simple and lightweight wildcard pattern matching.
    • go-zero-widthstars95 - Zero-width character detection and removal for Go.
    • gofeedstars1.6k - Parse RSS and Atom feeds in Go.
    • gographvizstars428 - Parses the Graphviz DOT language.
    • gommon/bytes - Format bytes to string.
    • gonamepartsstars33 - Parses human names into individual name parts.
    • goqstars195 - Declarative unmarshaling of HTML using struct tags with jQuery syntax (uses GoQuery).
    • GoQuerystars10.1k - GoQuery brings a syntax and a set of features similar to jQuery to the Go language.
    • goregenstars54 - Library for generating random strings from regular expressions.
    • goribotstars193 - A simple golang spider/scraping framework,build a spider in 3 lines.
    • gotextstars297 - GNU gettext utilities for Go.
    • guesslanguagestars51 - Functions to determine the natural language of a unicode text.
    • html-to-markdownstars166 - Convert HTML to Markdown. Even works with entire websites and can be extended through rules.
    • htmlquerystars356 - An XPath query package for HTML, lets you extract data or evaluate from HTML documents by an XPath expression.
    • injectstars1.3k - Package inject provides a reflect based injector.
    • ltsvstars5 - High performance LTSV (Labeled Tab Separated Value) reader for Go.
    • mxjstars467 - Encode / decode XML as JSON or map[string]interface{}; extract values with dot-notation paths and wildcards. Replaces x2j and j2x packages.
    • normalizestars15 - Sanitize, normalize and compare fuzzy text.
    • omniparserstars334 - A versatile ETL library that parses text input (CSV/txt/JSON/XML/EDI/X12/EDIFACT/etc) in streaming fashion and transforms data into JSON output using data-driven schema.
    • pagserstars34 - Pagser is a simple, extensible, configurable parse and deserialize html page to struct based on goquery and struct tags for golang crawler.
    • podcaststars92 - iTunes Compliant and RSS 2.0 Podcast Generator in Golang
    • sdpstars109 - SDP: Session Description Protocol [RFC 4566].
    • shstars3.7k - Shell parser and formatter.
    • slugstars642 - URL-friendly slugify with multiple languages support.
    • Slugifystars27 - Go slugify application that handles string.
    • syndfeedstars7 - A syndication feed for Atom 1.0 and RSS 2.0.
    • tomlstars3.5k - TOML configuration format (encoder/decoder with reflection).
  • Utility
    • gofuckyourselfstars31 - A sanitization-based swear filter for Go.
    • gotabulatestars264 - Easily pretty-print your tabular data with Go.
    • kacestars16 - Common case conversions covering common initialisms.
    • parseargs-gostars8 - string argument parser that understands quotes and backslashes.
    • parthstars40 - URL path segmentation parsing.
    • radixstars171 - fast string sorting algorithm.
    • regroupstars81 - Match regex expression named groups into go struct using struct tags and automatic parsing.

    • Testing

  • Testing Frameworks
    • apitest - Simple and extensible behavioural testing library for REST based services or HTTP handlers that supports mocking external http calls and rendering of sequence diagrams.
    • assertstars32 - Basic Assertion Library used along side native go testing, with building blocks for custom assertions.
    • badiostars10 - Extensions to Go's testing/iotest package.
    • baloostars707 - Expressive and versatile end-to-end HTTP API testing made easy.
    • biffstars10 - Bifurcation testing framework, BDD compatible.
    • charlatanstars195 - Tool to generate fake interface implementations for tests.
    • commanderstars185 - Tool for testing cli applications on windows, linux and osx.
    • covergatesstars38 - Self-hosted code coverage report review and management service.
    • cupaloystars158 - Simple snapshot testing addon for your test framework.
    • dbcleanerstars127 - Clean database for testing purpose, inspired by database_cleaner in Ruby.
    • dsunitstars38 - Datastore testing for SQL, NoSQL, structured files.
    • embedded-postgresstars125 - Run a real Postgres database locally on Linux, OSX or Windows as part of another Go application or test.
    • endlystars184 - Declarative end to end functional testing.
    • flutestars15 - HTTP client testing framework.
    • frisbystars265 - REST API testing framework.
    • ginkgo - BDD Testing Framework for Go.
    • gnomockstars439 - integration testing with real dependencies (database, cache, even Kubernetes or AWS) running in Docker, without mocks.
    • go-carpetstars210 - Tool for viewing test coverage in terminal.
    • go-cmpstars2.3k - Package for comparing Go values in tests.
    • go-hitstars30 - Hit is an http integration test framework written in golang.
    • go-mutestingstars392 - Mutation testing for Go source code.
    • go-testdeepstars163 - Extremely flexible golang deep comparison, extends the go testing package.
    • go-vcrstars513 - Record and replay your HTTP interactions for fast, deterministic and accurate tests.
    • goblinstars784 - Mocha like testing framework fo Go.
    • gocstars343 - Goc is a comprehensive coverage testing system for The Go Programming Language.
    • gocheck - More advanced testing framework alternative to gotest.
    • GoConveystars6.3k - BDD-style framework with web UI and live reload.
    • gocreststars79 - Composable hamcrest-like matchers for Go assertions.
    • godogstars1.3k - Cucumber or Behat like BDD framework for Go.
    • gofightstars368 - API Handler Testing for Golang Router framework.
    • gogivenstars9 - YATSPEC-like BDD testing framework for Go.
    • gomatchstars39 - library created for testing JSON against patterns.
    • gomega - Rspec like matcher/assertion library.
    • GoSpecstars114 - BDD-style testing framework for the Go programming language.
    • gospecifystars53 - This provides a BDD syntax for testing your Go code. It should be familiar to anybody who has used libraries such as rspec.
    • gosuitestars9 - Brings lightweight test suites with setup/teardown facilities to testing by leveraging Go1.7's Subtests.
    • gotest.toolsstars219 - A collection of packages to augment the go testing package and support common patterns.
    • Hamcreststars26 - fluent framework for declarative Matcher objects that, when applied to input values, produce self-describing results.
    • httpexpectstars1.7k - Concise, declarative, and easy to use end-to-end HTTP and REST API testing.
    • jsonassertstars61 - Package for verifying that your JSON payloads are serialized correctly.
    • restitstars53 - Go micro framework to help writing RESTful API integration test.
    • schemastars15 - Quick and easy expression matching for JSON schemas used in requests and responses.
    • stop-and-gostars5 - Testing helper for concurrency.
    • testcasestars65 - Idiomatic testing framework for Behavior Driven Development.
    • testfixturesstars663 - A helper for Rails' like test fixtures to test database applications.
    • Testifystars13.2k - Sacred extension to the standard go testing package.
    • testmd - Convert markdown snippets into testable go code.
    • testsqlstars10 - Generate test data from SQL files before testing and clear it after finished.
    • trialstars5 - Quick and easy extendable assertions without introducing much boilerplate.
    • Ttstars5 - Simple and colorful test tools.
    • wsteststars84 - Websocket client for unit-testing a websocket http.Handler.
  • Mock
    • counterfeiterstars526 - Tool for generating self-contained mock objects.
    • go-localstackstars12 - Tool for using localstack in AWS testing.
    • go-sqlmockstars3.5k - Mock SQL driver for testing database interactions.
    • go-txdbstars356 - Single transaction based database driver mainly for testing purposes.
    • gockstars1.2k - Versatile HTTP mocking made easy.
    • gomockstars5.5k - Mocking framework for the Go programming language.
    • govcrstars96 - HTTP mock for Golang: record and replay HTTP interactions for offline testing.
    • hoverflystars1.7k - HTTP(S) proxy for recording and simulating REST/SOAP APIs with extensible middleware and easy-to-use CLI.
    • httpmockstars1.1k - Easy mocking of HTTP responses from external resources.
    • minimockstars349 - Mock generator for Go interfaces.
    • mockhttpstars22 - Mock object for Go http.ResponseWriter.
    • mockitstars5 - Allows functions and method easy mocking, without defining new types; it's similar to Mockito for Java.
    • timexstars53 - A test-friendly replacement for the native time package.

    Database

    • mongo-go-driverstars5.7k - Official MongoDB driver for the Go language.
